title: rosa × submitis var. obscura
intro: Rosa × submitis var. obscura, also known as the dark-leaved Rosa × submitis, is a rare and lesser-known variety of hybrid rose that is believed to be a cross between Rosa rugosa and Rosa acicularis. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rosa × submitis var. obscura include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Rosa × submitis var. obscura can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
